title: Add Breadcrumb component
description: Create a Breadcrumb React component in src/components/ui/breadcrumb.tsx that renders a trail of links. Props: items: { label: string; href?: string }[]. Active item (last) is plain text, others are links. Include unit test with vitest and @testing-library/react.
existing_patterns: src/components/dark-mode-toggle.tsx — simple standalone UI component with 'use client' directive and co-located test
src/components/board/PriorityBadge.tsx — simple presentational component with interface props
vitest with @testing-library/react for unit tests, as seen in dark-mode-toggle.test.tsx and other .test.tsx files
